# Onboarding: REST API Controller Gen Skill
This skill helps you generate production-ready ASP.NET Core REST API controllers.
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for controller patterns and CQRS.
2. Use tools in tools/ for code generation (e.g. dotnet-aspnet-codegenerator).
3. See examples/README.md for controller templates.
## Troubleshooting
- **Controller not generated?**
- Check tool installation and project references.
